criteria_verification.criterion_text: `src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py` exposes `class LlamaSwapAdapter` with constructor `__init__(self, base_url: str, *, _stub_response: Callable[[str], SwapStatus] | None = None)`. The `_stub_response` keyword-only arg is the test seam; production callers never pass it.
criteria_verification.evidence: LlamaSwapAdapter is defined in src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py with the exact required signature: __init__(self, base_url: str, *, _stub_response: Callable[[str], SwapStatus] | None = None). The class docstring explicitly tags _stub_response as a test seam that production callers must not pass. tests/test_llamaswap_adapter.py::TestAC001ConstructorSignature has 4 tests verifying the keyword-only kind, the None default, and that positional injection raises TypeError.
criteria_verification.notes: LlamaSwapAdapter is defined in src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py with the exact required signature: __init__(self, base_url: str, *, _stub_response: Callable[[str], SwapStatus] | None = None). The class docstring explicitly tags _stub_response as a test seam that production callers must not pass. tests/test_llamaswap_adapter.py::TestAC001ConstructorSignature has 4 tests verifying the keyword-only kind, the None default, and that positional injection raises TypeError.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `LlamaSwapAdapter.get_status(alias: str) -> SwapStatus` returns `SwapStatus(loaded_model=<alias>, eta_seconds=0, source="stub")` by default (model is assumed loaded).
criteria_verification.evidence: get_status returns SwapStatus(loaded_model=alias, eta_seconds=0, source="stub") when _stub_response is None. Verified by TestAC002DefaultGetStatusReturnsLoadedSnapshot — three tests cover field-by-field equality, alias forwarding, and SwapStatus instance type.
criteria_verification.notes: get_status returns SwapStatus(loaded_model=alias, eta_seconds=0, source="stub") when _stub_response is None. Verified by TestAC002DefaultGetStatusReturnsLoadedSnapshot — three tests cover field-by-field equality, alias forwarding, and SwapStatus instance type.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: When the test `_stub_response` returns `SwapStatus(loaded_model=<alias>, eta_seconds=180, source="stub")` (or any eta_seconds > 30), the adapter returns that value unchanged — the adapter does not interpret the ETA, only the supervisor does.
criteria_verification.evidence: get_status calls self._stub_response(alias) and returns its value verbatim — no ETA inspection, no source rewriting, no field overrides. TestAC003StubResponseForwardedUnchanged covers eta_seconds=180 forwarding, alias propagation across multiple calls, and source="live" propagation (proving the adapter does not coerce source back to "stub").
criteria_verification.notes: get_status calls self._stub_response(alias) and returns its value verbatim — no ETA inspection, no source rewriting, no field overrides. TestAC003StubResponseForwardedUnchanged covers eta_seconds=180 forwarding, alias propagation across multiple calls, and source="live" propagation (proving the adapter does not coerce source back to "stub").

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_status` is pure / idempotent: repeated calls with the same alias return equivalent `SwapStatus` instances; no internal counter or cache mutation across reads (scenario: *Repeated swap-status reads for the same alias return consistent results*).
criteria_verification.evidence: The implementation has no mutable state on the read path — it stores only base_url and _stub_response on __init__ and never writes to self in get_status. TestAC004PureIdempotentReads asserts equality across repeated default reads, equality across repeated stub reads, and that adapter.__dict__ is unchanged after 10 get_status calls.
criteria_verification.notes: The implementation has no mutable state on the read path — it stores only base_url and _stub_response on __init__ and never writes to self in get_status. TestAC004PureIdempotentReads asserts equality across repeated default reads, equality across repeated stub reads, and that adapter.__dict__ is unchanged after 10 get_status calls.

criteria_verification.evidence: src/jarvis/adapters/__init__.py now imports LlamaSwapAdapter from .llamaswap and SwapStatus from .types, with __all__ = ["LlamaSwapAdapter", "SwapStatus"]. Verified by TestAC005PackageReExport (attribute resolution + __all__ membership). tests/test_reserved_packages.py and tests/test_import_graph.py were updated to drop jarvis.adapters from the reserved-empty package list — mirroring the same trajectory jarvis.tools followed in TASK-J002-015 — with explanatory comments on both call sites.
criteria_verification.notes: src/jarvis/adapters/__init__.py now imports LlamaSwapAdapter from .llamaswap and SwapStatus from .types, with __all__ = ["LlamaSwapAdapter", "SwapStatus"]. criteria_verification.criterion_text: No outbound HTTP call in Phase 2; no `httpx`/`requests` import required at runtime (test-overrideable stub IS the read path).
criteria_verification.evidence: src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py imports only `from collections.abc import Callable` and `from .types import SwapStatus` — no httpx, no requests, no urllib. TestAC006NoOutboundHttp asserts importing the module does not pull httpx or requests into sys.modules and AST-checks the source text for any forbidden import statement.
criteria_verification.notes: src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py imports only `from collections.abc import Callable` and `from .types import SwapStatus` — no httpx, no requests, no urllib. TestAC006NoOutboundHttp asserts importing the module does not pull httpx or requests into sys.modules and AST-checks the source text for any forbidden import statement.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Docstring names the real `/running` + `/log` endpoint paths so FEAT-JARVIS-004 can grep for them at swap time.
criteria_verification.evidence: Both the module docstring and the class docstring on LlamaSwapAdapter name the live endpoint paths verbatim — `GET /running` and `GET /log` — alongside the live base URL hint http://promaxgb10-41b1:9000. TestAC007DocstringNamesLiveEndpoints asserts the literal substrings '/running' and '/log' appear in LlamaSwapAdapter.__doc__.
criteria_verification.notes: Both the module docstring and the class docstring on LlamaSwapAdapter name the live endpoint paths verbatim — `GET /running` and `GET /log` — alongside the live base URL hint http://promaxgb10-41b1:9000. TestAC007DocstringNamesLiveEndpoints asserts the literal substrings '/running' and '/log' appear in LlamaSwapAdapter.__doc__.
